source.citation: Dolan AT, Diamond SL (2014). Systems Modeling of Ca²⁺ Homeostasis and Mobilization in Platelets Mediated by IP3 and Store-Operated Ca²⁺ Entry. Biophysical Journal 106(9):2049–2060.
source.figure: Figure 4 (panels A and C) and Figure 3 (panel B filtering criteria)
source.extraction_method: Literature values read directly from Dolan 2014 figure captions, panel axes, and accompanying text. Not pixel-digitised — the JSON ranges reflect what can be defended from the reported figure annotations.

resting_state.description: Reference resting concentrations Dolan accepts as physiologic. Filtering criterion: 25 nM ≤ Ca_cyt ≤ 100 nM, 100 µM ≤ Ca_dts ≤ 400 µM (Fig 3B).

with_extracellular_ca.label: +Ca_ex
with_extracellular_ca.description: Dolan 2014 Fig 4C blue trace: representative model run at 10× IP3 dose, [Ca²⁺]_ex = 1.2 mM. Stimulus begins at t=20 s in Fig 4A; t=0 in Fig 4C is the moment of stimulation.

peak_cyt_nM.panel: Fig 4C left, blue line; Fig 4A top-left mean ~325 nM with population spread to ~500 nM

peak_time_after_stim_s.source: Text: 'Ca²⁺_cyt generally peaks within 15–20 s of IP3 application' (p. 2055); Fig 4C blue peak ~30 s into the run

plateau_cyt_nM.panel: Fig 4C left, blue trace at t = 80–120 s sustains at ~200–250 nM

return_to_baseline_s.note: Sustained plateau; cyt does not return to baseline within Fig 4C 120-s window

without_extracellular_ca.label: −Ca_ex / EDTA
without_extracellular_ca.description: Dolan 2014 Fig 4C red trace: same 10× IP3 dose, [Ca²⁺]_ex = 1 pM (modelled as EDTA condition). For our reproduction we set CA_EX_UM = 0 (true EDTA) — Dolan's 1 pM is numerically the same as zero for our parameter ranges.

peak_time_after_stim_s.source: Text: '[Ca²⁺]_cyt peaks earlier in simulations without Ca_ex' (p. 2055); Fig 4C red peak ~20 s

plateau_cyt_nM.note: No sustained plateau under EDTA — the SOCE-driven plateau in the +Ca_ex condition is absent

return_to_baseline_s.panel: Fig 4C left, red trace returns to ~75 nM by t≈80 s

dts_min_uM.panel: Fig 4A bottom-right; deeper depletion than +Ca_ex; remains low (no refilling)

acceptance_criteria.description: Phase 3 validation criteria for the platelet-wcm v0.2 model, derived directly from Dolan 2014 Fig 3B filtering criteria. The model must reproduce qualitatively the SOCE-dependent shape difference between +Ca_ex and −Ca_ex.

stable_in_edta.rule: max DTS leak < 0.015 µM/s under EDTA

peak_amplitude_with_ca.rule: peak +Ca_ex within ±30% of Dolan reference (315–585 nM)

peak_amplitude_without_ca.rule: peak −Ca_ex within ±30% of Dolan reference (193–358 nM)
